title: ReferTrack: Referring Then Tracking for Embodied Visual Tracking
innovation_summary: ReferTrack: Referring Then Tracking for Embodied Visual Tracking: To address this, we introduce ReferTrack, a referring-then-tracking paradigm that grounds EVT using a single forward-facing camera.
